info.title: SmartRetry Terminal API
info.description: Payment gateway terminal service — Sale, Preauth, Capture, Refund, Void, Recurring, and Future transactions.

managed_by.description: Who manages the recurring: merchant, our_platform, or payment_provider.

first_payment_date.description: First payment date (YYYY-MM-DD). Required when managed_by is our_platform.

recurring_date_type.description: Payment frequency. Required when managed_by is our_platform.

time_interval.description: Interval between payments. Min: 1. Required when managed_by is our_platform.

number_of_payments.description: Total number of payments. Omit for unlimited recurring.

cancellation_date.description: End date for the recurring agreement (YYYY-MM-DD).

card_cardholder_name.description: The name of the card holder as it appears on the card.

card_number.description: The card number, which must be between 13 and 19 digits.

expiry_month.description: The expiration month of the card.

expiry_year.description: The expiration year of the card.

fingerprint.description: A unique identifier for the card profile, generated by SmartRetry.

friendly_id.description: A unique friendly identifier for the payer generated by SmartRetry.

fingerprint.description: A unique identifier for the payer's address generated by SmartRetry.

city_geoname_id.description: The GeoNames ID for the city. This should be a positive integer represented as a string.

state_code.description: The state code should be a valid ISO 3166-2 code (e.g., "US-CA" for California, USA).

country_code.description: The country code should be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g., "PH" for the Philippines, "IL" for Israel).

payer_fingerprint.description: Pre-computed payer fingerprint from an existing transaction. Mutually exclusive with payer.

token.description: A stored payment token from the merchant's Payment Instruments.

cvv.description: CVV/CVC of the card. Optional for added security (cannot be stored).

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

order_id.description: The order linked to this recurring series.

token.description: A token representing the payment instrument, generated by SmartRetry.

card_cardholder_name.description: The name of the card holder as it appears on the card.

card_card_last_four_digit.description: The last four digit of the card number

card_bin.description: The first six or eleven digits of the card number, which identify the card issuer and type.

expiration_date.description: Expiration date of card in ISO 8601 format

fingerprint.description: A unique identifier for the card profile, generated by SmartRetry.

name.description: The name of the card issuer (e.g., Bank of America, Chase, etc.).
The name of the card brand (e.g., Visa, Mastercard, Amex).

panLength.description: The length of the card number (PAN).

friendly_id.description: A unique friendly identifier for the payer generated by SmartRetry.

scheduled_date.description: Scheduled date and time for this payment (ISO 8601).
Scheduled date and time for this payment (ISO 8601).

executed_transaction.description: Transaction ID created when this future transaction was executed.

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

first_payment_date.description: New start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Only changeable if original start date has not passed.

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

scheduled_date.description: The scheduled date and time for this payment (ISO 8601).

executed_transaction.description: Transaction ID created when this future transaction was executed.

future_transaction_id.description: The future transaction identifier to update.

recurring_id.description: The recurring subscription identifier this future transaction belongs to.

scheduled_date.description: New scheduled date (ISO 8601 datetime). Must be in the future.

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

future_transaction_id.description: The future transaction identifier to charge immediately.

recurring_id.description: The recurring subscription identifier this future transaction belongs to.

amount.description: Override amount (e.g. 10.00 for $10.00). Uses the scheduled amount if omitted.

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

future_transaction_id.description: The future transaction identifier to cancel.

recurring_id.description: The recurring subscription identifier this future transaction belongs to.

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

merchant_transaction_id.description: A unique identifier for the transaction generated by the merchant.

amount.description: The amount to be authorized (e.g. 10.00 for $10.00).

currency.description: The currency of the transaction, represented as a three-letter ISO 4217 code.

fingerprint.description: A unique identifier for the device, generated by SmartRetry.

browser_language.description: The language setting of the browser, represented as an ISO 639-3 code.

order_id.description:
A unique identifier for the order generated by SmartRetry. Internally this
    is the friendly_id for the order and not the actual order_id in the database.

merchant_order_id.description: A unique identifier for the order generated by the merchant.

friendly_id.description: A unique friendly identifier for the payer generated by SmartRetry.

fingerprint.description: A unique identifier for the payer's address generated by SmartRetry.

city_geoname_id.description: The GeoNames ID for the city. This should be a positive integer represented as a string.

state_code.description: The state code should be a valid ISO 3166-2 code (e.g., "US-CA" for California, USA).

country_code.description: The country code should be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g., "PH" for the Philippines, "IL" for Israel).

card_cardholder_name.description: The name of the card holder as it appears on the card.

card_number.description: The card number, which must be between 13 and 19 digits.

expiry_month.description: The expiration month of the card.

expiry_year.description: The expiration year of the card.

fingerprint.description: A unique identifier for the card profile, generated by SmartRetry.

payer_request_ip_address.description: The IP address of the payer making the request.

delivery_address_usage_indicator.description: Indicates how long the shipping address has been associated with the customer.

delivery_timeframe.description: Indicates the delivery timeframe for the order.

friendly_id.description: A unique identifier for the recipient of the shipment. Generated by SmartRetry.

fingerprint.description: A unique identifier for the payer's address generated by SmartRetry.

city_geoname_id.description: The GeoNames ID for the city. This should be a positive integer represented as a string.

state_code.description: The state code should be a valid ISO 3166-2 code (e.g., "US-CA" for California, USA).

country_code.description: The country code should be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g., "PH" for the Philippines, "IL" for Israel).

token.description: A stored payment token from the merchant's Payment Instruments.

cvv.description: CVV/CVC of the card. Optional for added security (cannot be stored).

A unique identifier for the order generated by SmartRetry. Additional notes internally this

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

transaction_reference_id.description: The transaction friendly ID of the original transaction to be refunded

order_reference_id.description: The order friendly ID associated with the original transaction to be refunded

amount.description: Amount to refund (e.g. 10.00 for $10.00). Defaults to the full refundable amount if omitted.

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

transaction_reference_id.description: The transaction friendly ID of the original transaction to be voided

order_reference_id.description: The order friendly ID associated with the original transaction to be voided

parameters.name: terminal_friendly_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

transaction_reference_id.description: The transaction friendly ID of the original PREAUTH transaction to be captured

order_reference_id.description: The order friendly ID associated with the original PREAUTH transaction to be captured

amount.description: Amount to capture (e.g. 10.00 for $10.00). Defaults to the full authorized amount if omitted.
